meta.title: APES CIC website rebuild mood board
meta.summary: Eight single-image visual territories for the APES Cloudron LAMP rebuild.
meta.brief: Association of Protecting Exotic Species CIC public website rebuild
meta.goal: Unify APES branding across the rebuilt Cloudron LAMP site.

items.title: Rescue threshold at first light
items.caption: A calm arrival moment that suggests urgency without panic.
items.source: APES public rescue and continuity brief
items.prompt: Single editorial photograph of a modest community-animal rescue entrance at first light, ramp access, clean teal-painted doorway, soft mint reflections on wet pavement, one secure animal carrier near the door, warm interior glow, calm overcast British morning, trustworthy non-profit atmosphere, no readable text, no logos, no collage, no people facing camera. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.

items.title: Community building at dusk
items.caption: A credible public-facing mood for footer, governance and continuity.
items.source: APES footer, contact and governance requirements
items.motif: community site, evening light, public trust
items.prompt: Single exterior evening photograph of a modest British community building with softly lit windows, deep teal doorway, clean pavement after rain, reassuring non-profit atmosphere, subtle warm interior glow, believable and humble, no readable street signs, no logos, no people posing, not a collage.
